strengths: Direct match on primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, and React used across multiple roles including current position
Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, satisfying the AI agent development requirement
15+ years of breadth across backend, frontend, embedded, mobile, and devops demonstrates strong architectural versatility
concerns: No explicit NestJS experience mentioned despite it being a primary stack requirement
Vitest and Playwright are absent from listed skills; testing experience is implied through TDD practice but not framework-specific
Kotlin/Java listed as secondary requirements but only surface-level Java exposure mentioned, no Kotlin at all
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for the core of this role: deep TypeScript and Node.js experience, current fullstack work at an engineering tooling company, and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure that directly maps to the listed AI requirement. The primary gap is NestJS, which is central to the backend stack but absent from the resume; given his Node.js depth and history of picking up new frameworks quickly, this is learnable but should be probed. Kotlin/Java exposure is thin, which may matter depending on how much secondary backend work is involved.
